text: That you can see where they're spinning each other round and round and at some point in time they're all destroyed and there are a couple of them which leave us with some concerns. What we heard was pop, pop, pop, pop, pop, a lot of shots and people running and scaring around. It was really scary. It's scary too. Now that suspect, we do know had a Virginia ID as well as the Maryland tag on the black Honda, but police say they don't know exactly he was here in Philadelphia.
